zh.Gnandstein, Kohren-Sahlis, Sachsen, Germ: 多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 萊格可萊斯 波納格南德斯坦
zh.Gnandstein: 多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 萊格可萊斯 波納格南德斯坦
zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. nn NN於大約1248年出生在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 萊格可萊斯 波納格南德斯坦。她於大約1266年與Reinhard von Gnandstein在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 萊格可萊斯 波納格南德斯坦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: NN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Chong, Young, Chun, Hang, Ho, In, Jung, Maeng, Mijin, Rong, Hyong, Pong, Then, Yom, Lanh, Nu.  Cambodian Chea, Chhay, Chheng, Chhom, Voeun, Yoeun.  Spanish Alejandro, Angel, Miguel, Ricardo, Secundino, Tomas.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 阮, see   Ruan   3.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 殷 and 尹, see   Yin   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ruan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Xiu, Ying, Biao, Chao, Cheng, Guang, Guohua, Hua, Huiming, Jia, Jian Hua.  Spanish Jorge, Arnulfo, Arturo, Blanca, Carlos, Eduardo, Gregorio, Guillermo, Javier, Jesus, Jose, Josefina.
Irish and Scottish: variant of   Ruane  .
Spanish (Ruán): nickname from ruán ‘roan’ (a color of horses), a variant of Ruano .

nameMeanings.name: nn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. nn NN was born about 1248, in Gnandstein, Kreis Borna, Leipzig, East Germany. She married Reinhard von Gnandstein about 1266, in Gnandstein, Kreis Borna, Leipzig, East Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons.

ko.Gnandstein, Kohren-Sahlis, Sachsen, Germ: 동독 베지르크 레이p지그 크레이스 본아 그난드스타인

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. nn NN(은)는 대략 1248년 동독 베지르크 레이p지그 크레이스 본아 그난드스타인에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1266년 동독 베지르크 레이p지그 크레이스 본아 그난드스타인에서 Reinhard von Gnandstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. nn NN родилась около 1248 г. в местности гнандстин, крис борна, безирк липзиг, Восточная Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reinhard von Gnandstein около 1266 г. в местности гнандстин, крис борна, безирк липзиг, Восточная Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.
